findings.description: Section s3 is missing PascalCase class names `ProcessStop` and `ProcessAbnormalEnd` that appear in the defaults column of the configuration table (`normalEndExceptions` default = `[ProcessStop.class]`, `abnormalEndExceptions` default = `[ProcessAbnormalEnd.class]`).
findings.source_evidence: 設定項目テーブル: normalEndExceptions デフォルト=[ProcessStop.class], abnormalEndExceptions デフォルト=[ProcessAbnormalEnd.class]
